overview: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology (GNIT), established in 2008, is a premier autonomous engineering college located in Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad. Part of the Guru Nanak Institutions (GNI) group, the college is known for its research-driven academic environment and state-of-the-art infrastructure. GNIT focuses on providing industry-aligned education, particularly in emerging fields like Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, and Cyber Security, alongside traditional engineering disciplines.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH). Several undergraduate programs are NBA accredited.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE, EEE, Civil, IT, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TG EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + TG ICET rank
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TG PGECET score

placements.highestSalary: ₹30.0 LPA - ₹55.0 LPA (Top offers from Google/Amazon/Mu Sigma)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level web counseling by TGCHE. 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via entrance ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on institutional merit. Counseling Code: GNIT.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Results: Mid-May 2026; TG ICET 2026: May 13–14, 2026; Counseling: July 2026.

campus.area: Lush green campus integrated within the larger Guru Nanak Institutions estate
facilities: ICT Enabled Classrooms & Advanced Computer Labs
Specialized Research Centers and Innovation Hubs
Central Library with Digital Resource Center
On-campus Hostels for Boys and Girls (AC & Non-AC)
Hygienic Canteen and Multi-cuisine Food Court
Transport (Fleet covering all major suburbs of Hyderabad)
campus.specialNote: GNIT is notable for its 'Innovation Center' and 'Entrepreneurship Development Cell' (EDC), which support student startups. It has active MoUs with international universities and industry leaders like Berkadia to provide global exposure and specialized training modules.

contact.address: Khanapur Village, Ibrahimpatnam Mandal, Ranga Reddy District, Telangana - 501506
